degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial schema coverage review requested per-span and per-event requiredness, explicit observation identity, deterministic parent resolution, and deeper streaming/tool lifecycle contracts.
Initial Datadog mapping review requested concrete LLM Observability HTTP payload mapping for IDs, parent IDs, timestamps, duration, ml_app, meta.kind, token metrics, and event serialization.
Updated schema.md with identity and hierarchy rules, span/event matrices, streaming/tool/error lifecycle details, and concrete Datadog mapping tables.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
